notes: UP NCTS does not publish open route databases. This file contains 0 new routes — all referenced data (DOTC PTIS GTFS, SafeTravelPH, LTFRB tallies) has been captured in prior aspects (sakay-ph, tumi-datahub, safetravelph, ltfrb-*). The Mega Manila PTPSS (DOTC/NCTS 2012) is the most important unpublished comprehensive route database; contact ncts.library.updiliman@up.edu.ph for access.

pre_covid_2019.source: JICA Dream Plan 2014 / NCTS Mega Manila PTPSS 2012

post_rationalization_nov2024.source: TSSP 2024 context / LTFRB congressional testimony Dec 2023

edsa_pre_carousel.source: NCTS/TSSP 2023 Sanciangco et al (Mega Manila PTPSS 2012)
